project.name: gastronovi-workflow-adapter
project.description: Independent Node.js/TypeScript backend service that ingests Gastronovi-adjacent POS data, normalizes it into internal workflow events, and stores/audits workflow state through Prisma-backed PostgreSQL boundaries.

layers.name: Governance and Documentation
layers.description: Repository governance, README guidance, architecture decisions, event contracts, and UX planning documents.

layers.name: Configuration and Tooling
layers.description: Environment placeholders, package metadata, TypeScript, Vitest, Vercel, Prisma CLI, and analysis ignore configuration.

layers.name: Application Entry and HTTP
layers.description: Fastify application bootstrap, server startup, API adapter, health route, inventory route, auth actor handling, and shared runtime clients.

layers.name: Ingestion and Raw Payloads
layers.description: Raw payload hashing, ingestion orchestration, sync run persistence, and raw payload repository boundaries.

layers.name: Inventory Domain
layers.description: Inventory services, schemas, corrections, stock movement, purchase order, review task, withdrawal, goods receipt, master data, and demo seed behavior.

layers.name: Persistence and Database Schema
layers.description: Prisma schema and SQL migrations that define and evolve the Supabase/Postgres data model.

layers.name: Test Suite
layers.description: Vitest coverage for routes, services, repositories, schemas, auth, environment validation, and web shell behavior.

layers.name: Web Shell
layers.description: Static browser shell assets used for the lightweight frontend/admin experience.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and governance file to understand the adapter purpose, scope, and local operating rules.

tour.title: Runtime Bootstrap
tour.description: Follow how environment parsing starts the Fastify server and builds the application instance.

tour.title: HTTP Surface
tour.description: Inspect the Vercel adapter, health check, inventory route registration, actor authentication, and request validation flow.

tour.title: Inventory Workflow Services
tour.description: Review the inventory domain services that create items, receive goods, move stock, generate review tasks, and process corrections or withdrawals.

tour.title: Ingestion and Raw Payloads
tour.description: Trace raw external payload handling from hashing through ingestion and repository persistence boundaries.

tour.title: Persistence Model
tour.description: Use the Prisma schema and migrations to understand the Supabase/Postgres tables, indexes, and row-level-security setup.

tour.title: Browser Shell
tour.description: Inspect the static web shell used for the lightweight frontend experience and its accompanying tests.

tour.title: Validation Harness
tour.description: Finish with focused Vitest coverage across routes, services, repositories, schemas, auth, environment validation, and error handling.
